title: Regenerative Sleep
description: Heal when you pass the night in bed!
body:
# Regenerative Sleep
**Adding meaning to Minecraft's sleep. Perfect for survivals that feature no natural regeneration!**

# ✅ Features
- **Heal** when passing the night in a bed.
- **Server-side,** when playing in multiplayer, no client is required to have the mod.

# 📖 Configuration
Healing amounts per block or block tag can be changed in ```config/regenerative_sleep.json```.
